# Mark Gachanja Ngari

> Full stack developer based in Nairobi, Kenya, working across React, Next.js, and React Native on the frontend, and Node.js, Spring Boot, and Laravel on the backend. Currently employed full-time at Cenco Consultoria, and open to full-time roles, contract work, and freelance projects.

Mark led multiple production React 16 → React 18 migrations at Cenco Consultoria (Mar 2024–present, remote), defining the upgrade strategy and validating breaking changes before rollout. He independently built Arpella Stores, a mobile-first e-commerce platform spanning web, Android, and iOS (React + React Native), covering product catalog, authentication, checkout with M-Pesa payment, and push notifications.

Tech stack: JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, Java, PHP, HTML5, CSS3, React, Next.js, React Native (Expo), Node.js (Express), Spring Boot, Laravel, Git, GitHub, Figma.

Education: BSc Business Information Technology, Dedan Kimathi University of Technology (2022–2026, final year).
